svg.title: Fire/Smoke Detection System Architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the two-stage detection pipeline: YOLO fast detection followed by VLM confirmation before alert

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the camera reconnection logic work in main.py?')
sendPrompt('Explain the YOLODetector class and why FP32 and fusion are forced')
sendPrompt('Why is ByteTrack used and what does tracker_id provide?')
g.text: Assigns stable track IDs per object

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What filters are applied before sending to VLM? conf, cooldown, alerted_ids')
sendPrompt('How does the VLMWorker queue and background thread work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Qwen3 VLM verify the cropped image? Explain the prompt and output parsing')
sendPrompt('What is the final_decision logic in DecisionEngine?')
sendPrompt('How does send_alert work? What is the cooldown mechanism in DecisionEngine?')
